threats.description: Multiple IDPI techniques layered across HTML. Unit 42 documented up to 24 separate injection attempts on a single page using CSS rendering suppression, offscreen positioning, opacity:0, and white-on-white text to conceal injected prompts from human viewers while targeting AI agents for ad review evasion and SEO manipulation.
